endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/localNetworkGateways

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/generatevpnclientpackage
endpoints.description: Generates VPN client package for P2S client of the virtual network gateway in the specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/generatevpnprofile
endpoints.description: Generates VPN profile for P2S client of the virtual network gateway in the specified resource group. Used for IKEV2 and radius based authentication.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/getAdvertisedRoutes
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of routes the virtual network gateway is advertising to the specified peer.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/getBgpPeerStatus
endpoints.description: The GetBgpPeerStatus operation retrieves the status of all BGP peers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/getLearnedRoutes
endpoints.description: This operation retrieves a list of routes the virtual network gateway has learned, including routes learned from BGP peers.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/getvpnclientipsecparameters
endpoints.description: The Get VpnclientIpsecParameters operation retrieves information about the vpnclient ipsec policy for P2S client of virtual network gateway in the specified resource group through Network resource provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworkGateways/{virtualNetworkGatewayName}/getvpnprofilepackageurl
endpoints.description: Gets pre-generated VPN profile for P2S client of the virtual network gateway in the specified resource group. The profile needs to be generated first using generateVpnProfile.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{VIRTUALNETWORKGATEWAYNAME}} with a real virtualnetworkgatewayname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.
